title: LunarCrush: Combining Social and Market Data Spots Crypto Winners
summary: LunarCrush highlights that combining social momentum with market performance can identify top-performing cryptocurrencies. Zcash (ZEC) is currently topping their AltRank due to recent bullish discussions on Bankless.
body:
LunarCrush, a platform that tracks social media and market data for cryptocurrencies, recently emphasized the power of combining social momentum with market performance to spot winning coins. According to their latest insights, this combined approach can reveal which cryptocurrencies are gaining significant traction and potential.

The platform's current top coin by LunarCrush AltRank™ is Zcash (ZEC). This ranking is partly due to a recent appearance by Multicoin Capital's Tushar Jain and Helius's Mert on the Bankless podcast, where they pitched ZEC as a promising investment. The discussion likely contributed to increased social media buzz and market interest in Zcash.

For everyday crypto users, this means that paying attention to both social media trends and market performance can provide valuable insights into which coins might be worth investing in. By following platforms like LunarCrush, users can stay informed about the latest trends and potential opportunities in the crypto space.

To make the most of this information, users should keep an eye on LunarCrush's AltRank and other similar metrics. Watching for coins that gain significant social media attention alongside positive market performance can help identify potential winners. Stay updated with the latest discussions and market trends to make informed investment decisions.
